cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out the correct order of the places from east to west based on the information given. The passage sets up an imaginary road from San Francisco to New York. So San Francisco is on the west and New York is on the east. The businesses are lined up from the smallest in San Francisco to the largest in New York. The key part for the question is: "From San Francisco to about Reno, it is almost unnoticeable... From Reno eastward the poles increase in height until, near Columbus, Ohio - about four-fifths of the way across the nation..."
